scripts.pm2:start-prod-api: pm2 startOrReload ecosystem.config.cjs --only prod-barkan-api --update-env && pm2 save
scripts.e2e: VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4101 VITE_API_PORT=4101 PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4101 PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4899 npm run build && playwright test
scripts.e2e:ui: VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4101 VITE_API_PORT=4101 PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4101 PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4899 npm run build && playwright test --headed --debug
scripts.test: node scripts/build-skills.mjs && node scripts/validate-skills.mjs && npm --workspaces --if-present run test
